site.name: Vextrus
site.purpose: Marketing site for Vextrus — the AI-native ERP for Bangladesh construction & real estate; one system of record with an AI workforce on it, led by the shipped Drawing Estimator.

product.name: Vextrus
product.description: An AI-native, multi-tenant ERP for Bangladesh construction & real estate. VextrusAI is an AI workforce running on one connected system of record. One agent ships today — the Drawing Estimator, which turns a structural drawing into a Bill of Quantities and a waste-minimised Bar Bending Schedule. The rest of the workforce is labelled honestly: some in development, some on the roadmap. Agents write to the books only through a 4-Eyes, approval-gated mechanism: an agent proposes a change via a registered command, and a named person must approve before it is committed.
